title: pleopeltis heterocarpa
intro: Pleopeltis heterocarpa, also known as the spotted polypody or green polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, act as an anti-inflammatory, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pleopeltis heterocarpa include its use in treating conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or combining them with a solvent to create a concentrated extract.
